understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' in each level within the turn/attempt limits, avoiding spikes because landing on a spike ends the run and restarts the level on the next attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose an action such as moving one tile (e.g., MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN). Movement updates the player position by one grid cell if legal. Gravity is active (shown here as DOWN) and affects how the player settles after moves (the player will fall/continue in the gravity direction when not supported, and gravity direction can change depending on level elements). Hazard tiles like spikes immediately fail the attempt upon landing. The game provides 2 attempts per level and up to 50 turns per attempt; when an attempt fails the level restarts and the failure is added to recent context. Undo (when available) would revert the last move/state, including position and gravity/step count, to allow correcting mistakes.
